pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 9, export_result.sh line 19, verifier.py line 29 - task consistently checks for 'Failure to Appear' warrant type in warrant_types table
setup_opencad.sh line 218 - admin user created with email 'admin@opencad.local' via PHP INSERT statement
setup_opencad.sh line 216 - admin password set to 'Admin123!' before bcrypt hashing

privileged_info_summary: OpenCAD is a real open-source Computer-Aided Dispatch system for roleplay communities. The admin account is created with email 'admin@opencad.local' and password 'Admin123!'. 'Failure to Appear' is a legitimate legal warrant type (a warrant issued when a defendant fails to appear in court). The task requires adding this warrant type to the warrant_types table in the OpenCAD MySQL database via the web UI's Data Manager. The setup script deletes any pre-existing 'Failure to Appear' records to prevent gaming. The data is synthetic, based on GTA V characters and vehicles imported during OpenCAD initialization.
